common.sessionVerificationFailed: We could not verify your session or permissions.

login.title: Review candidate performance with the calm of an editorial workspace.
login.lead: The new design system trades brittle admin chrome for layered surfaces, sharper hierarchy, and faster decision-making during interview review.

unifiedShell.title: Unified shell
unifiedShell.description: Shared tokens across dashboard, library, and interview flows.

fastTriage.title: Fast triage
fastTriage.description: Move from sign-in straight into active interviews and scorecards.

demoMode.title: Demo mode
demoMode.description: Sample interviews only — no live backend.

hero.title: Run your interview pipeline from one editorial command surface.
hero.lead: Monitor active sessions, spot stalled candidates, and keep scoring flows moving without dropping into separate admin tools.

active.label: Active
active.description: Interviews currently waiting on answers, uploads, or scoring.

candidates.label: Candidates
candidates.description: Total candidate records visible in the current workspace.

questionLoad.label: Question Load
questionLoad.description: Questions currently attached across all visible interviews.

completed.label: Completed interviews
completed.description: Finished sessions with scorecards ready for review and handoff.

lastSync.label: Last sync
lastSync.liveDescription: Updated against the live backend just now.

snapshot.title: Today's pipeline
snapshot.description: The redesigned shell uses tonal layers instead of hard separators, so activity stays readable even when the data density grows.

empty.title: No interviews yet
empty.description: Start with a candidate, attach questions from the bank, and this dashboard becomes your operating surface.

bulkDelete.successTitle: Deleted {count, plural, one {# question} other {# questions}}
bulkDelete.successDescription: The library is up to date.
bulkDelete.noopDescription: None of the selected questions were removed.
bulkDelete.blockedIntro: These questions are used in active interviews and were not deleted:

similarity.noMatches: No close matches crossed the current similarity threshold.

dashboard.forbiddenTitle: You don't have access to the dashboard
dashboard.forbiddenDescription: The dashboard is reserved for HR, admin, and super-admin users. If you think this is a mistake, contact your workspace owner.

assessments.forbiddenTitle: You don't have access to assessments
assessments.forbiddenDescription: This area is reserved for HR and admin reviewers. If you think this is a mistake, contact your workspace owner.
assessments.notFoundFallback: The requested assessment could not be loaded.

interview.forbiddenTitle: You don't have access to this interview
interview.forbiddenDescription: Configuring interviews is reserved for HR, admin, and super-admin users. If you think this is a mistake, contact your workspace owner.
interview.createUnavailableTitle: Interview setup is unavailable right now
interview.notFoundFallback: The requested interview could not be loaded.

team.forbiddenTitle: You don't have access to team management
team.forbiddenDescription: This area is reserved for admins and super admins. If you think this is a mistake, contact your workspace owner.
team.unavailableTitle: Team management is unavailable right now

questions.loadFailedCardDescription: The editor could not load this question, so the route stops here instead of rendering a partially broken form.
questions.libraryForbiddenTitle: You don't have access to the question library
questions.libraryForbiddenDescription: The question library is reserved for HR, admin, and super-admin users. If you think this is a mistake, contact your workspace owner.
questions.libraryUnavailableTitle: Question library is unavailable right now
questions.createForbiddenTitle: You don't have access to create questions
questions.createForbiddenDescription: Creating questions is reserved for admin and super-admin users. If you think this is a mistake, contact your workspace owner.
questions.createUnavailableTitle: Question creation is unavailable right now

rerun.answerFailedFallback: Failed to start re-evaluation for this answer.
rerun.nothingToReevaluateMessage: No submitted answers to score yet. The candidate has not finished any answers.

validation.metadataMustBeObject: Metadata must be a JSON object (not an array or primitive).

editor.aiQuestionTextRequired: Question text is required before AI generation.
editor.conceptDescriptionFallback: {label} should be covered in the answer.
editor.headerLead: Shape the prompt, define the rubric, and keep AI-generated draft suggestions visible as explicit diffs instead of invisible background mutations.

prompt.title: Prompt and follow-up
prompt.description: Write the core question clearly, then capture the follow-up probes that interviewers should keep ready.
prompt.questionTextPlaceholder: e.g. What is a closure in JavaScript?
prompt.followUpHint: Use one line per probe so the interviewer can keep cadence during the session.

identity.title: Question identity
identity.description: Anchor the prompt in the role and taxonomy you expect recruiters to search later.

rubric.title: Evaluation rubric
rubric.description: Define what a good answer must cover and which signals should reduce confidence.

reference.title: Reference material
reference.description: Store extra context for future reviewers, exports, and scoring experiments.
reference.tagsHint: Comma or newline separated tags used for filtering and imports.
reference.metadataHint: Valid JSON object that can carry rubric or source information.

aiDraft.title: AI draft
aiDraft.description: Let AI propose category, follow-up probes, expected concepts, red flags, and tags based on your question text. Each change shows up as a reviewable diff before anything is applied.
aiDraft.loadingHint: Generating structured fields from the current prompt…

saveBar.fieldsChanged: {count, plural, one {# field changed} other {# fields changed}}
saveBar.descriptionClean: Editor matches the saved version. Make a change to enable Save.

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search by prompt, role, category, or tag

library.emptyBankDescription: Create your first reusable prompt and start building a structured question bank.
library.emptyFilteredTitle: No questions match the current filters
library.emptyFilteredDescription: Try widening the search, clearing a filter, or resetting back to defaults.

interview.emptyBankDescription: Create the first reusable prompt before you assemble an interview packet.
interview.emptyFilteredTitle: No questions match the current filters
interview.emptyFilteredDescription: Try clearing some filters or searching with a different term.

facet.filtersSubtitle: Refine the bank before you attach prompts.
facet.resetTitle: Clear all filters, search, and sort
facet.noValues: No values match the current filters.
facet.facetsUnavailable: Filter options could not be loaded.
facet.noTagsInWorkspace: No tags found in this workspace yet.

selected.title: Selected questions
selected.emptyHint: Picked questions appear here so you can find them while filtering.

header.title: Curate prompts with the same calm hierarchy as interview review.
header.lead: Use filters to reduce noise, then open a card to edit structure, rubric weighting, and AI draft coverage without leaving the shell.
header.filtersTitle: Tune the bank before you bulk edit or attach to interviews.
header.healthDescription: The new surface emphasizes utility metadata and evaluation depth rather than generic admin cards.

client.deleteTitle: Delete {count, plural, one {# question} other {# questions}}?
client.bulkDeleteDescription: Selected questions will be hidden from the library and from new interviews. Past interviews keep their snapshot. Questions used by active interviews will be skipped.

infinite.allLoaded: {count, plural, one {All # question loaded} other {All # questions loaded}}

similarity.title: Similarity search
similarity.description: Compare this draft against the bank using prompt tokens, tags, taxonomy, and rubric concepts.
similarity.idleHint: Add at least {min} characters of question text, then search for duplicates against the stored library via embeddings on the backend.
similarity.loadingHint: Comparing the current draft with the stored question library.
similarity.noMatchesYet: No matches yet — run a search.
similarity.staleHint: Results can go stale after edits — refresh when you are ready to compare again.

editPage.title: Edit Question
editPage.deleteDescription: It will be hidden from the library and from new interviews. Past interviews keep their snapshot. Active interviews block deletion.
editPage.restoreDescription: It will become visible in the library again and available for new interviews.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Deleting hides this question from the library and from new interviews. Past interviews keep their snapshot. Active interviews block deletion.

deletedBanner.title: This question is deleted
deletedBanner.description: It stays available for past interviews but is hidden from the library and new selections.

common.readyValidationRunning: Validation is running. Re-submit is blocked until the current pass finishes.
common.readyCanValidate: All submitted answers are ready for one-click validation.
common.readyLocked: Validation stays locked until every question has a submitted answer.
common.linkPreviewHelp: Showing a shortened preview here. “Copy link” copies the full secure URL.
common.linkNotReady: Candidate link is not available yet.
common.resultsNotAfterValidation: Results not yet available after validation
common.scorecardFootnote: Candidate feedback remains a tokenized route shared separately from the recruiter UI.
common.interviewLinkDescription: Share this link with the candidate to start the recording flow without recruiter sign-in.
common.packetLead: Upload audio/video manually if the candidate flow was completed outside the browser.
common.selectionDescription: Pick the prompts that actually differentiate the candidate. Your selection is kept even when filters hide a question from the list.
common.candidateBriefDescription: This metadata will anchor the scoring context once answers arrive.

list.title: Review submitted interviews and AI evaluations.
list.lead: Open a finished interview to see candidate answers, per-question scoring, behavior signals, and the overall result.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by candidate name or position
list.emptyDescription: Once a candidate submits an interview, it will appear here for review.
list.emptyFilteredTitle: No assessments match the current filters
list.emptyFilteredDescription: Try widening the search or reset the status filter to bring more interviews back in.

detail.failedDescription: The take ended in a failed state. Some answers, transcripts, or evaluations may be missing. You can re-run AI evaluation for any answer that does have a transcript below.

banner.slowTitle: Scoring is taking longer than usual
banner.slowDescription: {inFlight} of {total} answers are still being scored after several minutes. The worker may be stuck. Refresh manually to check, or re-run the affected answers.
banner.allFailedTitle: AI scoring failed for every answer
banner.allFailedDescription: None of the {total} submitted answers produced an evaluation. See the per-question error messages below for details, then re-run once the underlying issue is resolved.
banner.someFailedDescription: {scored} of {total} scored, {failed} failed. You can re-run the failed answers individually below.
banner.noneYetTitle: No AI evaluation has been run yet
banner.noneYetDescription: {total} answers submitted, none evaluated. Click "Re-run AI evaluation" to start scoring.

overall.placeholderDescription: This interview was completed before AI evaluation ran. The score and summary below are placeholder values from a simulated rollup. Click "Re-run AI evaluation" to generate a real result.

question.noAnswer: No answer was submitted for this question.
question.noEvaluationYet: No AI evaluation available for this answer yet.
question.scoringFailedTitle: AI scoring failed for this answer

media.noRecording: No recording was uploaded for this answer.
media.cameraAndScreen: Camera and screen recordings are available.
media.expiredDescription: Signed URLs are valid for one hour. Refresh to get new playback links.

team.heading: Team Members
team.lead: Manage your workspace collaborators and their access levels.

empty.title: No members found
empty.description: Try changing the role filter to see more results.

changeRole.title: Change role
changeRole.noRoles: No roles are available for your account to assign. If this looks wrong, try again signed in as a higher-level administrator.
changeRole.footnote: This change takes effect immediately. The user keeps their session until next request.

feedback.title: Your interview summary
feedback.lead: This page shares the reviewed outcome for the {position} interview and highlights both strengths and next areas to improve.
feedback.snapshotDescription: A compact overview of your current outcome and when this shared link expires.

createIntro.title: Assemble the candidate packet before you send the interview link.
createIntro.lead: Capture the role, choose only the questions that matter, and keep the decision criteria explicit before the recording session starts.

takeFlow.browserUnsupported: This browser must support camera, microphone, and full-screen sharing.
takeFlow.shortRecordingSubmit: Recording is too short to submit yet. Please record a bit longer and try again.
takeFlow.syncingInProgress: Recording is still syncing for this question. Try submitting again in a moment.
takeFlow.screenShareStopped: Screen sharing stopped. Reconnect camera and entire-screen sharing to continue this question.
takeFlow.recordingStoppedWithoutAction: Recording stopped without a follow-up action. Start a new version for this answer.
takeFlow.lobbyEnableCameraMicFirst: Enable your microphone and camera first, then share your entire screen.
takeFlow.lobbyInterviewStartBlocked: Could not start the interview. Keep microphone, camera, and entire-screen sharing active, then try again.
takeFlow.lobbyLead: Enable mic and camera, share your full screen, then select Start Interview when all checks are ready.
takeFlow.lobbyDevicesHelp: Status updates as you connect. In the system share dialog, choose Entire screen.
takeFlow.lobbyPreviewCameraOffLead: Tap the camera icon in the controls to turn your preview back on.
takeFlow.lobbyPreviewMutedLead: Tap the microphone or camera icon in the controls to allow access and show your preview.
takeFlow.sessionSyncFailed: Could not establish your interview session. Refresh the invite link or open it again in this browser.
takeFlow.consentPrepHint: Next you'll activate your microphone and camera, preview yourself, then share your entire screen to join.
takeFlow.guidanceInterview: While recording, tap Submit when you are finished, or Retake to record another attempt.
takeFlow.guidanceBeforeRecording: Your camera and full screen share stay on. Recording starts automatically when this question is ready.
takeFlow.guidanceInterviewerSpeaking: The interviewer is reading the question aloud. Recording will start automatically when they finish.
takeFlow.chooseEntireScreen: Choose Entire screen / Screen in the share picker. Browser tabs and app windows are not accepted.
takeFlow.permissionNotAllowed: Camera, microphone, and screen sharing must be allowed to continue.
takeFlow.permissionNotFound: A camera, microphone, or shareable display source was not found on this device.
takeFlow.permissionAborted: Permission setup was interrupted. Please try again.
takeFlow.permissionGeneric: Camera, microphone, and screen sharing must be enabled before the interview can start.
takeFlow.screenTrackMissing: Screen sharing did not provide a video track.
takeFlow.submitFallbackDetail: Please review recording data and try again.
takeFlow.consentWelcome: Welcome, {candidateName}. You will answer {questionCount}, with up to four minutes for each response.
takeFlow.consentDataCameraMic: Camera video and microphone audio for each answer
takeFlow.consentDataScreen: Full-monitor screen recording in parallel with each answer
takeFlow.consentDataBrowser: Browser activity such as tab switches
takeFlow.consentCheckboxLabel: I agree to the recording and data collection terms.
takeFlow.consentCheckboxHint: Data is used only for interview evaluation and is stored for 90 days.
takeFlow.permissionScreenReady: Entire screen is confirmed and ready.
takeFlow.capabilityMicDescription: Captured together with your camera feed.
takeFlow.capabilityScreenDescription: Must be shared as Entire screen, not a tab or app window.
takeFlow.capabilityFairnessDescription: Session and browser activity may be stored for evaluation integrity.
takeFlow.completeDescription: Your interview for {position} is submitted and saved securely for review. If you are selected to continue, our team will reach out within a few business days with next steps.
takeFlow.liveTranscriptUnavailable: Live transcript is unavailable in this browser. Recording continues as usual.
takeFlow.liveTranscriptPlaceholder: Transcript will appear while you speak...
takeFlow.beforeUnloadLeaveInterview: If you reload or leave now, you will exit this interview and may lose your progress. Are you sure?
